inputs.label: Resolution Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the output image in pixels for rendering.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the output image in pixels for rendering.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oluşturma için çıktı görüntüsünün piksel cinsinden genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite des Ausgabebildes in Pixeln für das Rendering.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de l'image de sortie en pixels pour le rendu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de la imagen de salida en píxeles para el renderizado.

inputs.label: Resolution Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the output image in pixels for rendering.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the output image in pixels for rendering.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oluşturma için çıktı görüntüsünün piksel cinsinden yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Ausgabebildes in Pixeln für das Rendering.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de l'image de sortie en pixels pour le rendu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Alto de la imagen de salida en píxeles para el renderizado.

inputs.label: Samples per Pixel
inputs.businessContext: Number of samples per pixel for anti-aliasing quality.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of samples per pixel for anti-aliasing quality.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kenar yumuşatma kalitesi için piksel başına örnek sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Samples pro Pixel für die Anti-Aliasing-Qualität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'échantillons par pixel pour la qualité anti-aliasing.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de muestras por píxel para la calidad de anti-aliasing.

inputs.label: Frame Count
inputs.businessContext: Total number of frames to render, e.g., for animation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of frames to render, e.g., for animation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örn. animasyon için oluşturulacak toplam kare sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der zu rendernden Bilder, z. B. für Animationen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'images à rendre, par exemple pour une animation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de fotogramas a renderizar, por ejemplo, para animación.

inputs.label: Render Engine Speed
inputs.businessContext: Render engine throughput in rays per second. Adjust for hardware/software.

businessContext_i18n.en: Render engine throughput in rays per second. Adjust for hardware/software.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oluşturma motorunun saniyedeki ışın işleme hızı. Donanım/yazılıma göre ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchsatz der Render-Engine in Strahlen pro Sekunde. An Hardware/Software anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit du moteur de rendu en rayons par seconde. Ajustez selon le matériel/logiciel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento del motor de renderizado en rayos por segundo. Ajustar según hardware/software.

inputs.label: Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Scene complexity multiplier. 1 for simple, 5 for highly complex.

businessContext_i18n.en: Scene complexity multiplier. 1 for simple, 5 for highly complex.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sahne karmaşıklık çarpanı. Basit için 1, çok karmaşık için 5.
businessContext_i18n.de: Szenenkomplexitäts-Multiplikator. 1 für einfach, 5 für sehr komplex.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur de complexité de scène. 1 pour simple, 5 pour très complexe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de complejidad de la escena. 1 para simple, 5 para altamente compleja.

inputs.label: Max Ray Bounces
inputs.businessContext: Maximum light bounces for global illumination. Higher increases realism and time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum light bounces for global illumination. Higher increases realism and time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Küresel aydınlatma için maksimum ışık sıçraması. Yüksek değer gerçekçiliği ve süreyi artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Lichtreflexionen für globale Beleuchtung. Höher erhöht Realismus und Zeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rebonds lumineux maximum pour l'illumination globale. Plus élevé augmente le réalisme et le temps.
businessContext_i18n.es: Máximo de rebotes de luz para iluminación global. Mayor aumenta realismo y tiempo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
